23	// Exit codes for ddx try terminal outcomes. These are specific to ddx try
24	// and intentionally do not reuse the generic ExitCode* constants because
25	// the bead-execution outcome vocabulary is distinct from generic CLI errors.
26	const (
27		tryExitSuccess         = 0 // success or already_satisfied
28		tryExitPreservedOrNone = 1 // preserved_for_review or no_changes
29		tryExitFailed          = 2 // execution_failed or any other terminal non-success
30	)
31	
32	// newTryCommand creates the top-level "ddx try <bead-id>" command.
33	// It targets a single specific bead through the full production execution
34	// machinery (claim → execute → land → review), unlike "ddx work" which drains
35	// the queue by picker priority and cannot force a specific bead.
36	func (f *CommandFactory) newTryCommand() *cobra.Command {
37		cmd := &cobra.Command{
38			Use:          "try <bead-id>",
39			Short:        "Execute a specific bead through the production machinery",
40			SilenceUsage: true,
41			Long: `try executes a single named bead through the full production
42	execution machinery: claim → execute → land → review.
43	
44	Unlike "ddx work" which drains the queue by picker priority, "ddx try"
45	targets a specific bead ID. This is useful for:
46	  - Operator-driven debugging when a bead misbehaves under autonomous drain
47	  - Deterministic queue ordering during refactor execution (dispatch each child
48	    in dep order with an explicit ID)
49	  - Path-comparison studies that need to execute one fixture bead at a time
50	
51	Pre-flight checks (run before any claim is issued):
52	  - bead not found → non-zero exit with "bead not found: <id>"
53	  - bead not claimable (status=closed, cancelled, etc.) → non-zero exit
54	  - bead has unmet dependencies → non-zero exit listing the blockers
55	
56	Review is on by default. --no-review is a break-glass override and
57	requires --no-review-i-know-what-im-doing. A bead label of review:skip
58	is only honored when it also carries a sibling review:skip-reason:*
59	label; otherwise the label is ignored.
60	
61	Flag plumbing is identical to "ddx work": --harness, --model, --provider,
62	--profile, --effort are forwarded to the agent as opaque passthrough
63	constraints. DDx does not validate or branch on their string values.
64	
65	Exit codes:
66	  0  success or already_satisfied
67	  1  preserved_for_review or no_changes
68	  2  execution_failed or any other terminal non-success
69	`,
70			Example: `  # Execute a specific bead
71	  ddx try ddx-abc12345
72	
73	  # Execute with an explicit harness and model
74	  ddx try ddx-abc12345 --harness codex --model gpt-5.4-mini
75	
76	  # Execute without the post-merge review step (break-glass only)
77	  ddx try ddx-abc12345 --no-review --no-review-i-know-what-im-doing`,
78			Args: cobra.ExactArgs(1),
79			RunE: f.runTry,
80		}
81	
82		// Routing knobs — identical to "ddx work" passthrough surface.
83		cmd.Flags().String("project", "", "Target project root path or name (default: CWD git root). Env: DDX_PROJECT_ROOT")
84		cmd.Flags().String("from", "", "Base git revision to start from (default: HEAD)")
85		cmd.Flags().String("harness", "", "Agent harness constraint (passthrough; ddx try does not validate)")
86		cmd.Flags().String("model", "", "Model constraint (passthrough; ddx try does not validate)")
87		cmd.Flags().String("profile", "", "Routing profile: default, cheap, fast, or smart (empty = unconstrained; let the agent service choose)")
88		cmd.Flags().String("provider", "", "Provider constraint (passthrough; ddx try does not validate)")
89		cmd.Flags().String("model-ref", "", "Model reference passthrough (e.g. code-medium); resolved by Fizeau")
90		cmd.Flags().String("effort", "", "Effort level")
91		cmd.Flags().Bool("no-review", false, "Skip post-merge review (break-glass: requires --no-review-i-know-what-im-doing)")
92		cmd.Flags().Bool("no-review-i-know-what-im-doing", false, "Break-glass acknowledgement required when using --no-review")
93		cmd.Flags().String("review-harness", "", "Harness for the post-merge reviewer (default: same as implementation harness)")
94		cmd.Flags().String("review-model", "", "Model override for the post-merge reviewer (default: smart tier)")
95		cmd.Flags().Duration("request-timeout", 0, "Per-request provider wall-clock timeout; overrides project config and model-class defaults")
96		cmd.Flags().Int("min-power", 0, "Minimum model power required (0 = unconstrained)")
97		cmd.Flags().Int("max-power", 0, "Maximum model power allowed (0 = unconstrained)")
98	
99		return cmd
100	}
101	
102	// runTry is the RunE for "ddx try <bead-id>".
103	func (f *CommandFactory) runTry(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
104		if err := f.checkLifecycleMigrationGate(cmd); err != nil {
105			return err
106		}
107	
108		beadID := args[0]
109	
110		projectFlag, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("project")
111		projectRoot := resolveProjectRoot(projectFlag, f.WorkingDir)
112	
113		// Preflight: warn once per process for degraded project-local skill layout.
114		// Runs before claim/worktree setup so the operator sees the warning before
115		// any bead state changes.
116		preflightResult := checkProjectRuntimePreflight(projectRoot)
117		f.preflightWarnOnce.Do(func() {
118			emitPreflightWarning(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), preflightResult)
119		})
120	
121		fromRev, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("from")
122		harness, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("harness")
123		model, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("model")
124		profile, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("profile")
125		provider, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("provider")
126		modelRef, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("model-ref")
127		effort, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("effort")
128		noReview, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("no-review")
129		noReviewAck, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("no-review-i-know-what-im-doing")
130		reviewHarness, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("review-harness")
131		reviewModel, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("review-model")
132		requestTimeout, _ := cmd.Flags().GetDuration("request-timeout")
133		minPower, _ := cmd.Flags().GetInt("min-power")
134		maxPower, _ := cmd.Flags().GetInt("max-power")
135	
136		if noReview && !noReviewAck {
137			return fmt.Errorf("--no-review requires --no-review-i-know-what-im-doing (break-glass acknowledgement)")
138		}
139	
140		store := bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx"))
141	
142		// Pre-flight: look up the bead.
143		target, err := store.Get(beadID)
144		if err != nil {
145			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), "bead not found: %s\n", beadID)
146			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
147		}
148	
149		// Pre-flight: verify the bead is in a claimable state.
150		// Claimable = open, or stale in_progress (the loop handles stale reclaim).
151		switch target.Status {
152		case bead.StatusOpen, bead.StatusInProgress:
153			// allowed — loop's Claim() handles stale-heartbeat reclaim
154		default:
155			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), "bead is not claimable (status=%s)\n", target.Status)
156			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
157		}
158	
159		// Pre-flight: check for unmet dependencies.
160		if unmet := unmetDeps(store, target); len(unmet) > 0 {
161			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), "bead has unmet dependencies: %s\n", strings.Join(unmet, ", "))
162			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
163		}
164	
165		// Wrap the real store so that ReadyExecution() returns only the target bead.
166		// All other operations pass through to the underlying store unchanged.
167		forcedStore := &singleBeadStore{Store: store, target: *target}
168	
169		// Set up progress logging (same as runAgentExecuteLoopImpl).
170		loopSessionID := fmt.Sprintf("agent-loop-%d", time.Now().UnixNano())
171		loopLogDir := filepath.Join(projectRoot, agent.DefaultLogDir)
172		_ = os.MkdirAll(loopLogDir, 0o755)
173		loopLogPath := filepath.Join(loopLogDir, loopSessionID+".jsonl")
174		var loopSink io.Writer
175		if lf, openErr := os.OpenFile(loopLogPath, os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY|os.O_APPEND, 0o644); openErr == nil {
176			loopSink = lf
177			defer lf.Close() //nolint:errcheck
178		}
179	
180		// Worker-probe (best-effort server mirror; non-blocking).
181		probeIdent := workerprobe.Identity{
182			ProjectRoot:  projectRoot,
183			Harness:      harness,
184			Model:        model,
185			ExecutorPID:  os.Getpid(),
186			ExecutorHost: hostnameOrEmpty(),
187			StartedAt:    time.Now().UTC(),
188		}
189		probe := workerprobe.New(probeIdent, workerprobe.Config{
190			AddrFunc: serverpkg.ReadServerAddr,
191		})
192		probeCtx, probeCancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
193		probe.Start(probeCtx)
194		defer func() {
195			probeCancel()
196			probe.Stop()
197		}()
198		if loopSink != nil {
199			loopSink = workerprobe.TeeJSONL(loopSink, probe)
200		} else {
201			loopSink = workerprobe.TeeJSONL(io.Discard, probe)
202		}
203	
204		// Process-local LandCoordinator.
205		localCoord := serverpkg.NewLocalLandCoordinator(projectRoot, agent.RealLandingGitOps{})
206		defer localCoord.Stop()
207	
208		// Post-merge reviewer (on by default, skipped via --no-review).
209		var reviewer agent.BeadReviewer
210		if !noReview {
211			reviewer = &agent.DefaultBeadReviewer{
212				ProjectRoot: projectRoot,
213				BeadStore:   bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
214				BeadEvents:  bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
215				Harness:     reviewHarness,
216				Model:       reviewModel,
217			}
218		}
219	
220		profile = agent.NormalizeRoutingProfile(profile)
221	
222		// Determine whether zero-config auto-route applies (same logic as runWork).
223		noRoutingFlags := harness == "" && model == "" && provider == "" && modelRef == "" &&
224			!cmd.Flags().Changed("profile")
225		autoInferTier := noRoutingFlags && !projectHasRoutingConfig(projectRoot)
226		resourceChecker := buildCLIResourceChecker(projectRoot, f.resourceCheckerOverride)
227	
228		// Build the executor: either the test override or the real single-tier executor.
229		var executor agent.ExecuteBeadExecutor
230		if f.tryExecutorOverride != nil {
231			executor = f.tryExecutorOverride
232		} else {
233			executor = agent.ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc(func(ctx context.Context, execBeadID string) (agent.ExecuteBeadReport, error) {
234				var inferredTier escalation.ModelTier
235				if autoInferTier {
236					if b, getErr := store.Get(execBeadID); getErr == nil {
237						inferredTier = escalation.InferTier(b)
238					} else {
239						inferredTier = escalation.TierCheap
240					}
241				}
242	
243				loopOverrides := config.CLIOverrides{
244					Harness:           harness,
245					Model:             model,
246					Provider:          provider,
247					ModelRef:          modelRef,
248					Profile:           profile,
249					Effort:            effort,
250					MinPower:          minPower,
251					MaxPower:          maxPower,
252					OpaquePassthrough: true, // ddx try treats flags as opaque passthrough
253				}
254				if requestTimeout > 0 {
255					loopOverrides.ProviderRequestTimeout = &requestTimeout
256				}
257				attemptRcfg, _ := config.LoadAndResolve(projectRoot, loopOverrides)
258				gitOps := &agent.RealGitOps{}
259				res, execErr := agent.ExecuteBeadWithConfig(ctx, projectRoot, execBeadID, attemptRcfg, agent.ExecuteBeadRuntime{
260					FromRev:         fromRev,
261					Output:          cmd.OutOrStdout(),
262					BeadEvents:      bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
263					ResourceChecker: resourceChecker,
264				}, gitOps)
265				if execErr != nil && res == nil {
266					return agent.ExecuteBeadReport{}, execErr
267				}
268				if res != nil && agent.IsResourceExhaustedStatus(res.Status) {
269					return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, string(inferredTier)), nil
270				}
271				if execErr != nil {
272					agent.MarkResultExecutionError(res, execErr)
273					return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, string(inferredTier)), nil
274				}
275				if res != nil && res.ResultRev != "" && res.ResultRev != res.BaseRev && res.ExitCode == 0 {
276					targetBead, _ := store.Get(execBeadID)
277					landRes, _, landErr := agent.SubmitWithPreMergeChecks(
278						ctx, projectRoot, targetBead, res,
279						func(req agent.LandRequest) (*agent.LandResult, error) { return localCoord.Submit(req) },
280						bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
281						resolveClaimAssignee(), "ddx try",
282						nil,
283					)
284					if landErr == nil {
285						agent.ApplyLandResultToExecuteBeadResult(res, landRes)
286						_ = agent.WriteExecuteBeadResultArtifact(projectRoot, res)
287					} else {
288						agent.MarkResultLandError(projectRoot, res, landErr)
289						_ = agent.WriteExecuteBeadResultArtifact(projectRoot, res)
290						return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, string(inferredTier)), nil
291					}
292				} else if res != nil && (res.Outcome == agent.ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskFailed || res.ExitCode != 0) {
293					if res.ResultRev != "" && res.ResultRev != res.BaseRev {
294						res.Outcome = "preserved"
295					} else {
296						res.Outcome = "error"
297					}
298					res.Status = agent.ClassifyExecuteBeadStatus(res.Outcome, res.ExitCode, res.Reason)
299				} else if res != nil && res.ResultRev == res.BaseRev {
300					res.Outcome = "no-changes"
301					res.Status = agent.ClassifyExecuteBeadStatus(res.Outcome, res.ExitCode, res.Reason)
302				}
303				tierStr := ""
304				if inferredTier != "" {
305					tierStr = string(inferredTier)
306				}
307				return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, tierStr), nil
308			})
309		}
310	
311		worker := &agent.ExecuteBeadWorker{
312			Store:    forcedStore,
313			Executor: executor,
314			Reviewer: reviewer,
315		}
316	
317		overrides := config.CLIOverrides{
318			Assignee: resolveClaimAssignee(),
319			Harness:  harness,
320			Model:    model,
321			Provider: provider,
322			ModelRef: modelRef,
323			Profile:  profile,
324			Effort:   effort,
325		}
326		rcfg, err := config.LoadAndResolve(projectRoot, overrides)
327		if err != nil {
328			return fmt.Errorf("load resolved config: %w", err)
329		}
330		if _, err := resourceChecker.Check(cmd.Context()); err != nil {
331			if resErr, ok := err.(*agent.ResourceExhaustedError); ok && resErr != nil {
332				fmt.Fprintln(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), resErr.Error())
333			}
334			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: err.Error()}
335		}
336	
337		cliLandingOps := agent.RealLandingGitOps{}
338		var qualityRunner agent.AgentRunner
339		if f.AgentRunnerOverride != nil {
340			qualityRunner = f.AgentRunnerOverride
341		}
342		lintHook := agent.NewPreDispatchLintHook(projectRoot, store, rcfg, nil, qualityRunner)
343		triageHook := agent.NewPostAttemptTriageHook(projectRoot, store, rcfg, nil, qualityRunner, nil)
344		result, runErr := worker.Run(cmd.Context(), rcfg, agent.ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime{
345			Mode:                  executeloop.ModeOnce,
346			Log:                   cmd.OutOrStdout(),
347			EventSink:             loopSink,
348			WorkerID:              resolveClaimAssignee(),
349			ProjectRoot:           projectRoot,
350			ResourceChecker:       resourceChecker,
351			SessionID:             loopSessionID,
352			PreClaimHook:          buildCLIPreClaimHook(projectRoot, cliLandingOps),
353			PreDispatchLintHook:   lintHook,
354			PostAttemptTriageHook: triageHook,
355			NoReview:              noReview,
356		})
357		if runErr != nil {
358			if (errors.Is(runErr, context.Canceled) || errors.Is(runErr, context.DeadlineExceeded)) && result != nil && len(result.Results) > 0 {
359				writeTryResult(cmd.OutOrStdout(), result.Results[0])
360			}
361			return runErr
362		}
363	
364		// Report outcome.
365		if result.NoReadyWork {
366			// Bead was not in the execution-ready queue even after pre-flight passed.
367			// This can happen if a heartbeat re-appeared just before claim, making it
368			// not stale-enough for reclaim. Surface a clear message.
369			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), "bead is not execution-ready (it may be actively claimed by another worker): %s\n", beadID)
370			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
371		}
372	
373		if len(result.Results) == 0 {
374			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
375		}
376		report := result.Results[0]
377		writeTryResult(cmd.OutOrStdout(), report)
378		if intent := escalation.ParseExecutionHint(target); intent.Source == escalation.ExecutionIntentSourceBeadHint && intent.RequestedTier != "" {
379			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "routing intent: tier=%s source=%s\n", intent.RequestedTier, intent.Source)
380		}
381	
382		return tryExitCodeForStatus(report.Status)
383	}
384	
385	func writeTryResult(w io.Writer, report agent.ExecuteBeadReport) {
386		fmt.Fprintf(w, "\nbead: %s\nstatus: %s\n", report.BeadID, report.Status)
387		if report.Detail != "" {
388			fmt.Fprintf(w, "detail: %s\n", report.Detail)
389		}
390		if report.ResultRev != "" {
391			fmt.Fprintf(w, "result_rev: %s\n", report.ResultRev)
392		}
393		if report.PreserveRef != "" {
394			fmt.Fprintf(w, "preserve_ref: %s\n", report.PreserveRef)
395		}
396	}
397	
398	// tryExitCodeForStatus maps a bead execution status string to the ddx try exit code contract.
399	func tryExitCodeForStatus(status string) error {
400		switch status {
401		case agent.ExecuteBeadStatusSuccess, agent.ExecuteBeadStatusAlreadySatisfied:
402			return nil // exit 0
403		case agent.ExecuteBeadStatusPreservedNeedsReview, agent.ExecuteBeadStatusNoChanges,
404			agent.ExecuteBeadStatusNoEvidenceProduced:
405			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitPreservedOrNone, Message: ""}
406		default:
407			// execution_failed and all other terminal non-success statuses
408			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
409		}
410	}
411	
412	// unmetDeps returns the IDs of deps that are not yet closed, in the order
413	// they appear in the bead's dependency list.
414	func unmetDeps(store *bead.Store, b *bead.Bead) []string {
415		depIDs := b.DepIDs()
416		if len(depIDs) == 0 {
417			return nil
418		}
419		var unmet []string
420		for _, depID := range depIDs {
421			dep, err := store.Get(depID)
422			if err != nil || dep.Status != bead.StatusClosed {
423				unmet = append(unmet, depID)
424			}
425		}
426		return unmet
427	}
428	
429	// singleBeadStore wraps a *bead.Store and overrides ReadyExecution to return
430	// only a single target bead. All other operations are delegated unchanged.
431	// This allows the execute-bead worker to treat the forced bead as if it were
432	// the only entry in the execution-ready queue.
433	type singleBeadStore struct {
434		*bead.Store
435		target bead.Bead
436	}
437	
438	func (s *singleBeadStore) ReadyExecution() ([]bead.Bead, error) {
439		return []bead.Bead{s.target}, nil
440	}
441

43

45		env := NewTestEnvironment(t)

53	
54		factory := NewCommandFactory(env.Dir)

56		factory.AgentRunnerOverride = &tryHookRunnerStub{t: t}
57		factory.tryExecutorOverride = runner
58		root := factory.NewRootCommand()
59	
60		ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
61		root.SetContext(ctx)
62

65		root.SetErr(&buf)
66		root.SetArgs([]string{"try", "try-interrupt-001", "--no-review", "--no-review-i-know-what-im-doing"})
67

// TestWork_PreservesJSONResultSchema_SameAsExecuteLoop verifies that ddx work
// --json output carries the schema fields operators depend on: attempts,
// successes, failures, no_ready_work, and results.
func TestWork_PreservesJSONResultSchema_SameAsExecuteLoop(t *testing.T) {
	env := NewTestEnvironment(t)
	root := NewCommandFactory(env.Dir).NewRootCommand()

	out, err := executeCommand(root, "work", "--json", "--once")
	require.NoError(t, err, "ddx work --json on empty queue must exit 0")

	jsonStart := strings.Index(out, "{")
	require.NotEqual(t, -1, jsonStart, "ddx work --json must produce JSON output: %s", out)
	jsonPart := out[jsonStart:]

	var schema struct {
		Attempts    int              `json:"attempts"`
		Successes   int              `json:"successes"`
		Failures    int              `json:"failures"`
		NoReadyWork bool             `json:"no_ready_work"`
		Results     []map[string]any `json:"results"`
	}
	require.NoError(t, json.Unmarshal([]byte(jsonPart), &schema),
		"ddx work --json must produce valid JSON matching the execute-loop schema: %s", jsonPart)
	assert.True(t, schema.NoReadyWork,
		"ddx work on an empty queue must report no_ready_work=true")
	assert.Equal(t, 0, schema.Attempts, "no attempts on empty queue")
}

No files found

183	- `ddx bead import/export` - JSONL interchange with bd/br
184	- `ddx bead migrate` - Externalize closed-bead events to `.ddx/attachments/` and move eligible closed beads into `.ddx/beads-archive.jsonl`. Idempotent; safe to re-run.
185	
186	**Queue Work:**
187	- `ddx work` - Drain the bead execution queue (all flags pass through)
188	
189	**Agent Service:**
190	- `ddx run --harness=<name> --prompt <file>` - Invoke an AI agent
191	- `ddx run --quorum=majority --harnesses=a,b` - Multi-agent consensus
192	- `ddx try <id> [--from <rev>]` - Run agent in isolated worktree, merge or preserve result
193	- `ddx agent list` - Show available harnesses
194	- `ddx agent doctor` - Harness health check
195	- `ddx agent log` - Session history
196	
197	**Resource Commands:**
198	- `ddx prompts list/show` - AI prompts
199	- `ddx templates list/apply` - Project templates
200	- `ddx persona list/show/bind` - AI personas
201	- `ddx mcp list/install` - MCP servers
202

23	// Exit codes for ddx try terminal outcomes. These are specific to ddx try
24	// and intentionally do not reuse the generic ExitCode* constants because
25	// the bead-execution outcome vocabulary is distinct from generic CLI errors.
26	const (
27		tryExitSuccess         = 0 // success or already_satisfied
28		tryExitPreservedOrNone = 1 // preserved_for_review or no_changes
29		tryExitFailed          = 2 // execution_failed or any other terminal non-success
30	)
31	
32	// newTryCommand creates the top-level "ddx try <bead-id>" command.
33	// It targets a single specific bead through the full production execution
34	// machinery (claim → execute → land → review), unlike "ddx work" which drains
35	// the queue by picker priority and cannot force a specific bead.
36	func (f *CommandFactory) newTryCommand() *cobra.Command {
37		cmd := &cobra.Command{
38			Use:          "try <bead-id>",
39			Short:        "Execute a specific bead through the production machinery",
40			SilenceUsage: true,
41			Long: `try executes a single named bead through the full production
42	execution machinery: claim → execute → land → review.
43	
44	Unlike "ddx work" which drains the queue by picker priority, "ddx try"
45	targets a specific bead ID. This is useful for:
46	  - Operator-driven debugging when a bead misbehaves under autonomous drain
47	  - Deterministic queue ordering during refactor execution (dispatch each child
48	    in dep order with an explicit ID)
49	  - Path-comparison studies that need to execute one fixture bead at a time
50	
51	Pre-flight checks (run before any claim is issued):
52	  - bead not found → non-zero exit with "bead not found: <id>"
53	  - bead not claimable (status=closed, cancelled, etc.) → non-zero exit
54	  - bead has unmet dependencies → non-zero exit listing the blockers
55	
56	Review is on by default. --no-review is a break-glass override and
57	requires --no-review-i-know-what-im-doing. A bead label of review:skip
58	is only honored when it also carries a sibling review:skip-reason:*
59	label; otherwise the label is ignored.
60	
61	Flag plumbing is identical to "ddx work": --harness, --model, --provider,
62	--profile, --effort are forwarded to the agent as opaque passthrough
63	constraints. DDx does not validate or branch on their string values.
64	
65	Exit codes:
66	  0  success or already_satisfied
67	  1  preserved_for_review or no_changes
68	  2  execution_failed or any other terminal non-success
69	`,
70			Example: `  # Execute a specific bead
71	  ddx try ddx-abc12345
72	
73	  # Execute with an explicit harness and model
74	  ddx try ddx-abc12345 --harness codex --model gpt-5.4-mini
75	
76	  # Execute without the post-merge review step (break-glass only)
77	  ddx try ddx-abc12345 --no-review --no-review-i-know-what-im-doing`,
78			Args: cobra.ExactArgs(1),
79			RunE: f.runTry,
80		}
81	
82		// Routing knobs — identical to "ddx work" passthrough surface.

102	// runTry is the RunE for "ddx try <bead-id>".
103	func (f *CommandFactory) runTry(cmd *cobra.Command, args []string) error {
104		if err := f.checkLifecycleMigrationGate(cmd); err != nil {
105			return err
106		}
107	
108		beadID := args[0]
109	
110		projectFlag, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("project")
111		projectRoot := resolveProjectRoot(projectFlag, f.WorkingDir)
112	
113		// Preflight: warn once per process for degraded project-local skill layout.
114		// Runs before claim/worktree setup so the operator sees the warning before
115		// any bead state changes.
116		preflightResult := checkProjectRuntimePreflight(projectRoot)
117		f.preflightWarnOnce.Do(func() {
118			emitPreflightWarning(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), preflightResult)
119		})
120	
121		fromRev, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("from")
122		harness, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("harness")
123		model, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("model")
124		profile, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("profile")
125		provider, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("provider")
126		modelRef, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("model-ref")
127		effort, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("effort")
128		noReview, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("no-review")
129		noReviewAck, _ := cmd.Flags().GetBool("no-review-i-know-what-im-doing")
130		reviewHarness, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("review-harness")
131		reviewModel, _ := cmd.Flags().GetString("review-model")
132		requestTimeout, _ := cmd.Flags().GetDuration("request-timeout")
133		minPower, _ := cmd.Flags().GetInt("min-power")
134		maxPower, _ := cmd.Flags().GetInt("max-power")
135	
136		if noReview && !noReviewAck {
137			return fmt.Errorf("--no-review requires --no-review-i-know-what-im-doing (break-glass acknowledgement)")
138		}
139	
140		store := bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx"))
141	
142		// Pre-flight: look up the bead.
143		target, err := store.Get(beadID)
144		if err != nil {
145			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), "bead not found: %s\n", beadID)
146			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
147		}
148	
149		// Pre-flight: verify the bead is in a claimable state.
150		// Claimable = open, or stale in_progress (the loop handles stale reclaim).
151		switch target.Status {
152		case bead.StatusOpen, bead.StatusInProgress:
153			// allowed — loop's Claim() handles stale-heartbeat reclaim
154		default:
155			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), "bead is not claimable (status=%s)\n", target.Status)
156			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
157		}
158	
159		// Pre-flight: check for unmet dependencies.
160		if unmet := unmetDeps(store, target); len(unmet) > 0 {
161			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), "bead has unmet dependencies: %s\n", strings.Join(unmet, ", "))
162			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
163		}
164	
165		// Wrap the real store so that ReadyExecution() returns only the target bead.
166		// All other operations pass through to the underlying store unchanged.
167		forcedStore := &singleBeadStore{Store: store, target: *target}
168	
169		// Set up progress logging (same as runAgentExecuteLoopImpl).
170		loopSessionID := fmt.Sprintf("agent-loop-%d", time.Now().UnixNano())
171		loopLogDir := filepath.Join(projectRoot, agent.DefaultLogDir)
172		_ = os.MkdirAll(loopLogDir, 0o755)
173		loopLogPath := filepath.Join(loopLogDir, loopSessionID+".jsonl")
174		var loopSink io.Writer
175		if lf, openErr := os.OpenFile(loopLogPath, os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY|os.O_APPEND, 0o644); openErr == nil {
176			loopSink = lf
177			defer lf.Close() //nolint:errcheck
178		}
179	
180		// Worker-probe (best-effort server mirror; non-blocking).
181		probeIdent := workerprobe.Identity{
182			ProjectRoot:  projectRoot,
183			Harness:      harness,
184			Model:        model,
185			ExecutorPID:  os.Getpid(),
186			ExecutorHost: hostnameOrEmpty(),
187			StartedAt:    time.Now().UTC(),
188		}
189		probe := workerprobe.New(probeIdent, workerprobe.Config{
190			AddrFunc: serverpkg.ReadServerAddr,
191		})
192		probeCtx, probeCancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
193		probe.Start(probeCtx)
194		defer func() {
195			probeCancel()
196			probe.Stop()
197		}()
198		if loopSink != nil {
199			loopSink = workerprobe.TeeJSONL(loopSink, probe)
200		} else {
201			loopSink = workerprobe.TeeJSONL(io.Discard, probe)
202		}
203	
204		// Process-local LandCoordinator.
205		localCoord := serverpkg.NewLocalLandCoordinator(projectRoot, agent.RealLandingGitOps{})
206		defer localCoord.Stop()
207	
208		// Post-merge reviewer (on by default, skipped via --no-review).
209		var reviewer agent.BeadReviewer
210		if !noReview {
211			reviewer = &agent.DefaultBeadReviewer{
212				ProjectRoot: projectRoot,
213				BeadStore:   bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
214				BeadEvents:  bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
215				Harness:     reviewHarness,
216				Model:       reviewModel,
217			}
218		}
219	
220		profile = agent.NormalizeRoutingProfile(profile)
221	
222		// Determine whether zero-config auto-route applies (same logic as runWork).
223		noRoutingFlags := harness == "" && model == "" && provider == "" && modelRef == "" &&
224			!cmd.Flags().Changed("profile")
225		autoInferTier := noRoutingFlags && !projectHasRoutingConfig(projectRoot)
226		resourceChecker := buildCLIResourceChecker(projectRoot, f.resourceCheckerOverride)
227	
228		// Set up git ops — injectable for tests. Placed before executor creation so
229		// RecoverOrphans runs regardless of whether tryExecutorOverride is set.
230		var tryGitOps agent.GitOps = &agent.RealGitOps{}
231		if f.executeBeadGitOverride != nil {
232			tryGitOps = f.executeBeadGitOverride
233		}
234		// Recover orphaned worktrees from previous crashed runs before any claim or
235		// executor is built.
236		agent.RecoverOrphans(tryGitOps, projectRoot, beadID)
237	
238		// Build the executor: either the test override or the real single-tier executor.
239		var executor agent.ExecuteBeadExecutor
240		if f.tryExecutorOverride != nil {
241			executor = f.tryExecutorOverride
242		} else {
243			executor = agent.ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc(func(ctx context.Context, execBeadID string) (agent.ExecuteBeadReport, error) {
244				var inferredTier escalation.ModelTier
245				if autoInferTier {
246					if b, getErr := store.Get(execBeadID); getErr == nil {
247						inferredTier = escalation.InferTier(b)
248					} else {
249						inferredTier = escalation.TierCheap
250					}
251				}
252	
253				loopOverrides := config.CLIOverrides{
254					Harness:           harness,
255					Model:             model,
256					Provider:          provider,
257					ModelRef:          modelRef,
258					Profile:           profile,
259					Effort:            effort,
260					MinPower:          minPower,
261					MaxPower:          maxPower,
262					OpaquePassthrough: true, // ddx try treats flags as opaque passthrough
263				}
264				if requestTimeout > 0 {
265					loopOverrides.ProviderRequestTimeout = &requestTimeout
266				}
267				attemptRcfg, _ := config.LoadAndResolve(projectRoot, loopOverrides)
268				runtime := agent.ExecuteBeadRuntime{
269					FromRev:         fromRev,
270					Output:          cmd.OutOrStdout(),
271					BeadEvents:      bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
272					ResourceChecker: resourceChecker,
273				}
274				if f.AgentRunnerOverride != nil {
275					runtime.AgentRunner = f.AgentRunnerOverride
276				}
277				res, execErr := agent.ExecuteBeadWithConfig(ctx, projectRoot, execBeadID, attemptRcfg, runtime, tryGitOps)
278				if execErr != nil && res == nil {
279					return agent.ExecuteBeadReport{}, execErr
280				}
281				if res != nil && agent.IsResourceExhaustedStatus(res.Status) {
282					return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, string(inferredTier)), nil
283				}
284				if execErr != nil {
285					agent.MarkResultExecutionError(res, execErr)
286					return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, string(inferredTier)), nil
287				}
288				if res != nil && res.ResultRev != "" && res.ResultRev != res.BaseRev && res.ExitCode == 0 {
289					// Evaluate required execution gates before landing, mirroring the
290					// server-side evaluateGatesAndSubmit pattern. BuildLandingGateContext
291					// pins ResultRev to a transient ref and checks out an ephemeral worktree;
292					// failures are soft-logged and gate eval is skipped.
293					buildGateCtx := agent.BuildLandingGateContext
294					if f.tryBuildGateContextOverride != nil {
295						buildGateCtx = f.tryBuildGateContextOverride
296					}
297					wt, ids, gateCleanup, ctxErr := buildGateCtx(projectRoot, res, tryGitOps)
298					if ctxErr != nil {
299						fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "ddx: warning: gate-context setup failed: %v (skipping required-gate eval)\n", ctxErr)
300					}
301					if gateCleanup != nil {
302						defer gateCleanup()
303					}
304					if wt != "" {
305						checksAbs := filepath.Join(projectRoot, res.ExecutionDir, "checks.json")
306						checksRel := filepath.Join(res.ExecutionDir, "checks.json")
307						anyFailed, ratchetFailed, evalErr := agent.EvaluateRequiredGatesForResult(wt, ids, res, projectRoot, checksAbs, checksRel)
308						if evalErr != nil {
309							fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "ddx: warning: gate evaluation failed: %v (skipping)\n", evalErr)
310						} else if anyFailed || ratchetFailed {
311							preserveRef := agent.PreserveRef(res.BeadID, res.BaseRev)
312							if upErr := tryGitOps.UpdateRef(projectRoot, preserveRef, res.ResultRev); upErr != nil {
313								fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "ddx: warning: preserving result ref %s failed: %v\n", preserveRef, upErr)
314							} else {
315								res.PreserveRef = preserveRef
316							}
317							res.Outcome = "preserved"
318							if ratchetFailed {
319								res.Reason = agent.RatchetPreserveReason
320							} else {
321								res.Reason = "post-run checks failed"
322							}
323							res.Status = agent.ClassifyExecuteBeadStatus(res.Outcome, res.ExitCode, res.Reason)
324							res.Detail = agent.ExecuteBeadStatusDetail(res.Status, res.Reason, res.Error)
325							_ = agent.WriteExecuteBeadResultArtifact(projectRoot, res)
326							return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, string(inferredTier)), nil
327						}
328					}
329	
330					targetBead, _ := store.Get(execBeadID)
331					landRes, _, landErr := agent.SubmitWithPreMergeChecks(
332						ctx, projectRoot, targetBead, res,
333						func(req agent.LandRequest) (*agent.LandResult, error) { return localCoord.Submit(req) },
334						bead.NewStore(filepath.Join(projectRoot, ".ddx")),
335						resolveClaimAssignee(), "ddx try",
336						nil,
337					)
338					if landErr == nil {
339						agent.ApplyLandResultToExecuteBeadResult(res, landRes)
340						_ = agent.WriteExecuteBeadResultArtifact(projectRoot, res)
341					} else {
342						agent.MarkResultLandError(projectRoot, res, landErr)
343						_ = agent.WriteExecuteBeadResultArtifact(projectRoot, res)
344						return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, string(inferredTier)), nil
345					}
346				} else if res != nil && (res.Outcome == agent.ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskFailed || res.ExitCode != 0) {
347					if res.ResultRev != "" && res.ResultRev != res.BaseRev {
348						res.Outcome = "preserved"
349					} else {
350						res.Outcome = "error"
351					}
352					res.Status = agent.ClassifyExecuteBeadStatus(res.Outcome, res.ExitCode, res.Reason)
353				} else if res != nil && res.ResultRev == res.BaseRev {
354					res.Outcome = "no-changes"
355					res.Status = agent.ClassifyExecuteBeadStatus(res.Outcome, res.ExitCode, res.Reason)
356				}
357				tierStr := ""
358				if inferredTier != "" {
359					tierStr = string(inferredTier)
360				}
361				return agent.ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, tierStr), nil
362			})
363		}
364	
365		worker := &agent.ExecuteBeadWorker{
366			Store:    forcedStore,
367			Executor: executor,
368			Reviewer: reviewer,
369		}
370	
371		overrides := config.CLIOverrides{
372			Assignee: resolveClaimAssignee(),
373			Harness:  harness,
374			Model:    model,
375			Provider: provider,
376			ModelRef: modelRef,
377			Profile:  profile,
378			Effort:   effort,
379		}
380		rcfg, err := config.LoadAndResolve(projectRoot, overrides)
381		if err != nil {
382			return fmt.Errorf("load resolved config: %w", err)
383		}
384		if _, err := resourceChecker.Check(cmd.Context()); err != nil {
385			if resErr, ok := err.(*agent.ResourceExhaustedError); ok && resErr != nil {
386				fmt.Fprintln(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), resErr.Error())
387			}
388			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: err.Error()}
389		}
390	
391		cliLandingOps := agent.RealLandingGitOps{}
392		var qualityRunner agent.AgentRunner
393		if f.AgentRunnerOverride != nil {
394			qualityRunner = f.AgentRunnerOverride
395		}
396		lintHook := agent.NewPreDispatchLintHook(projectRoot, store, rcfg, nil, qualityRunner)
397		triageHook := agent.NewPostAttemptTriageHook(projectRoot, store, rcfg, nil, qualityRunner, nil)
398		result, runErr := worker.Run(cmd.Context(), rcfg, agent.ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime{
399			Mode:                  executeloop.ModeOnce,
400			Log:                   cmd.OutOrStdout(),
401			EventSink:             loopSink,
402			WorkerID:              resolveClaimAssignee(),
403			ProjectRoot:           projectRoot,
404			ResourceChecker:       resourceChecker,
405			SessionID:             loopSessionID,
406			PreClaimHook:          buildCLIPreClaimHook(projectRoot, cliLandingOps),
407			PreDispatchLintHook:   lintHook,
408			PostAttemptTriageHook: triageHook,
409			NoReview:              noReview,
410		})
411		if runErr != nil {
412			if (errors.Is(runErr, context.Canceled) || errors.Is(runErr, context.DeadlineExceeded)) && result != nil && len(result.Results) > 0 {
413				writeTryResult(cmd.OutOrStdout(), result.Results[0])
414			}
415			return runErr
416		}
417	
418		// Report outcome.
419		if result.NoReadyWork {
420			// Bead was not in the execution-ready queue even after pre-flight passed.
421			// This can happen if a heartbeat re-appeared just before claim, making it
422			// not stale-enough for reclaim. Surface a clear message.
423			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.ErrOrStderr(), "bead is not execution-ready (it may be actively claimed by another worker): %s\n", beadID)
424			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
425		}
426	
427		if len(result.Results) == 0 {
428			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
429		}
430		report := result.Results[0]
431		writeTryResult(cmd.OutOrStdout(), report)
432		if intent := escalation.ParseExecutionHint(target); intent.Source == escalation.ExecutionIntentSourceBeadHint && intent.RequestedTier != "" {
433			fmt.Fprintf(cmd.OutOrStdout(), "routing intent: tier=%s source=%s\n", intent.RequestedTier, intent.Source)
434		}
435	
436		return tryExitCodeForStatus(report.Status)
437	}
438	
439	func writeTryResult(w io.Writer, report agent.ExecuteBeadReport) {
440		fmt.Fprintf(w, "\nbead: %s\nstatus: %s\n", report.BeadID, report.Status)
441		if report.Detail != "" {
442			fmt.Fprintf(w, "detail: %s\n", report.Detail)
443		}
444		if report.ResultRev != "" {
445			fmt.Fprintf(w, "result_rev: %s\n", report.ResultRev)
446		}
447		if report.PreserveRef != "" {
448			fmt.Fprintf(w, "preserve_ref: %s\n", report.PreserveRef)
449		}
450	}
451	
452	// tryExitCodeForStatus maps a bead execution status string to the ddx try exit code contract.
453	func tryExitCodeForStatus(status string) error {
454		switch status {
455		case agent.ExecuteBeadStatusSuccess, agent.ExecuteBeadStatusAlreadySatisfied:
456			return nil // exit 0
457		case agent.ExecuteBeadStatusPreservedNeedsReview, agent.ExecuteBeadStatusNoChanges,
458			agent.ExecuteBeadStatusNoEvidenceProduced:
459			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitPreservedOrNone, Message: ""}
460		default:
461			// execution_failed and all other terminal non-success statuses
462			return &ExitError{Code: tryExitFailed, Message: ""}
463		}
464	}
465	
466	// unmetDeps returns the IDs of deps that are not yet closed, in the order
467	// they appear in the bead's dependency list.
468	func unmetDeps(store *bead.Store, b *bead.Bead) []string {
469		depIDs := b.DepIDs()
470		if len(depIDs) == 0 {
471			return nil
472		}
473		var unmet []string
474		for _, depID := range depIDs {
475			dep, err := store.Get(depID)
476			if err != nil || dep.Status != bead.StatusClosed {
477				unmet = append(unmet, depID)
478			}
479		}
480		return unmet
481	}
482	
483	// singleBeadStore wraps a *bead.Store and overrides ReadyExecution to return
484	// only a single target bead. All other operations are delegated unchanged.
485	// This allows the execute-bead worker to treat the forced bead as if it were
486	// the only entry in the execution-ready queue.
487	type singleBeadStore struct {
488		*bead.Store
489		target bead.Bead
490	}
491	
492	func (s *singleBeadStore) ReadyExecution() ([]bead.Bead, error) {
493		return []bead.Bead{s.target}, nil
494	}

func TestZeroConfigTry_DispatchesWithEmptyProfile(t *testing.T) {
	t.Setenv("DDX_DISABLE_UPDATE_CHECK", "1")

	stub := installExecuteCapturingStub(t)

	dir := setupWorkIntakeFixture(t)
	factory := NewCommandFactory(dir)
	factory.AgentRunnerOverride = &tryHookRunnerStub{t: t}
	root := factory.NewRootCommand()
	_, _ = executeCommand(root, "try", "ddx-intake-test", "--no-review", "--no-review-i-know-what-im-doing")

	stub.mu.Lock()
	executionSeen := stub.executionSeen
	executionReq := stub.executionReq
	stub.mu.Unlock()

	require.True(t, executionSeen, "ddx try must reach the implementation dispatch")
	assert.Empty(t, executionReq.Profile)
	assert.Zero(t, executionReq.MinPower)
	assert.Zero(t, executionReq.MaxPower)
}

// newExecuteBeadFactory builds a CommandFactory wired with the given fake git and runner.
func newExecuteBeadFactory(t *testing.T, git *fakeExecuteBeadGit, runner *fakeAgentRunner) *CommandFactory {
	t.Helper()
	f := NewCommandFactory(t.TempDir())
	seedDefaultExecuteBeads(t, f.WorkingDir)
	f.AgentRunnerOverride = runner
	f.executeBeadGitOverride = git
	f.executeBeadOrchestratorGitOverride = git
	f.executeBeadLandingAdvancerOverride = fakeLandingAdvancerFromGit(git)
	return f
}

# agent-cmd-test-migration: Classification Audit

**Bead**: ddx-d8474e0e  
**Execution**: 20260510T003036-55f17274

## Deleted Test Files (cobra route depended on retired `ddx agent` surface)

| File | Reason |
|------|--------|
| `agent_execute_bead_test.go` | Tested `ddx agent execute-bead` cobra route; helpers extracted to `execute_bead_test_helpers_test.go` |
| `agent_execute_bead_e2e_test.go` | E2E tests for `ddx agent execute-bead`; retired with the command |
| `agent_execute_bead_gates_test.go` | Gate evaluation via `ddx agent execute-bead`; coverage migrated to `TestTry_AppliesGateContextToLanding` |
| `execute_bead_e2e_routing_test.go` | Routing E2E via `ddx agent execute-bead` route; retired |
| `agent_compare_config_test.go` | `ddx agent compare` cobra route tests |
| `agent_quorum_config_test.go` | `ddx agent quorum` cobra route tests |
| `agent_capabilities_test.go` | `ddx agent` capabilities tests |
| `agent_check_test.go` | `ddx agent check` cobra route tests |
| `agent_doctor_workers_test.go` | `ddx agent doctor/workers` cobra route tests |
| `agent_log_bead_test.go` | `ddx agent log` cobra route tests |
| `agent_metrics_test.go` | `ddx agent metrics` cobra route tests |
| `agent_models_test.go` | `ddx agent models` cobra route tests |
| `agent_providers_test.go` | `ddx agent providers` cobra route tests |
| `agent_route_status_test.go` | `ddx agent route-status` cobra route tests |
| `agent_run_config_test.go` | `ddx agent run` config tests |
| `agent_run_default_route_test.go` | `ddx agent run` default-route tests |
| `agent_run_dispatch_spec_test.go` | `ddx agent run` dispatch spec tests |
| `agent_run_overrides_e2e_test.go` | `ddx agent run` override E2E tests |
| `agent_run_profile_test.go` | `ddx agent run` profile tests |
| `agent_run_timeout_test.go` | `ddx agent run` timeout tests |
| `agent_usage_test.go` | `ddx agent usage` cobra route tests |
| `agent_workers_prune_test.go` | `ddx agent workers prune` cobra route tests |
| `agent_workers_stop_test.go` | `ddx agent workers stop` cobra route tests |
| `agent_executions_test.go` | `ddx agent executions` cobra route tests |
| `routinglint_test.go` | Routing lint tests tied to agent_cmd.go structure |
| `agent_metrics_review_evidence_test.go` | `computeReviewOutcomesReport` function, deleted with metrics agent command |

## Kept Test Files (engine logic, not cobra route)

| File | Status | Reason |
|------|--------|--------|
| `agent_execute_loop_costcap_test.go` | Kept | Tests engine cost-cap logic (now in work_impl.go) |
| `agent_execute_loop_e2e_test.go` | Kept | Execute-loop E2E via `ddx work` cobra route |
| `agent_execute_loop_escalation_test.go` | Kept | Escalation logic via execute-loop engine |
| `agent_execute_loop_review_repair_test.go` | Kept | Review/repair logic via execute-loop engine |
| `agent_execute_loop_routing_reject_test.go` | Kept | Routing rejection logic via execute-loop engine |
| `agent_execute_loop_test.go` | Kept | Core execute-loop unit tests; uses fakeExecuteBeadGit/fakeAgentRunner |
| `agent_mode_guidance_test.go` | Kept | Mode guidance tests (no cobra route dependency) |
| `agent_output_test.go` | Kept | Output formatting tests (no cobra route dependency) |

## Modified Test Files

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `agent_run_passthrough_test.go` | Removed 3 tests using `ddx agent run`/`ddx agent execute-bead` routes; removed `executeCapturingStub` type (moved to `run_test_helpers_test.go`); kept 5 tests exercising `ddx work`/`ddx try` routes |

## New Test Helper Files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `execute_bead_test_helpers_test.go` | `fakeExecuteBeadGit`, `fakeAgentRunner`, `newExecuteBeadFactory`, `fakeLandingAdvancerFromGit`; previously in `agent_execute_bead_test.go` |
| `run_test_helpers_test.go` | `stubAgentService`, `minimalProjectDir`, `executeCapturingStub`, `installExecuteCapturingStub`, `writeExecResult`; previously scattered across deleted files |

## New Required Tests (AC#10)

| Test | File | What it verifies |
|------|------|-----------------|
| `TestTry_RecoversOrphanedWorktreesBeforeSpawn` | `try_test.go` | `agent.RecoverOrphans` is called before executor build |
| `TestTry_AppliesGateContextToLanding` | `try_test.go` | `BuildLandingGateContext` is called when executor produces commits |
| `TestTry_PreservesJSONResultSchema_SameAsExecuteBead` | `try_test.go` | Output contains bead:, status:, result_rev:, preserve_ref: fields |
| `TestTry_ExitCodeContract_0_1_2` | `try_test.go` | Status → exit code mapping: success=0, preserved=1, failed=2 |
| `TestWork_PreservesJSONResultSchema_SameAsExecuteLoop` | `work_test.go` | `ddx work --json --once` output contains attempts/successes/failures/no_ready_work/results |

## Internal Tests Updated

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `internal/agent/session_index_test.go` | `TestProductionAgentExecutionPathsUseIndexedServiceWriter`: updated path `cmd/agent_cmd.go` → `cmd/run.go` for "ddx run" check; removed "replay" entry (command retired) |

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat(cli): retire ddx agent surface; replace with ddx run/try/work [ddx-d8474e0e]

Remove all agent_*.go source files and their cobra route tests.
Consolidate execute-loop implementation into work_impl.go, shared CLI
utilities into cli_helpers.go, worker state helpers into server_workers.go,
and usage statistics into usage_stats.go.

Wire agent.RecoverOrphans and agent.BuildLandingGateContext into try.go's
executor path (guarded by injectable test overrides). Add five required
tests: TestTry_RecoversOrphanedWorktreesBeforeSpawn,
TestTry_AppliesGateContextToLanding, TestTry_PreservesJSONResultSchema_SameAsExecuteBead,
TestTry_ExitCodeContract_0_1_2, and TestWork_PreservesJSONResultSchema_SameAsExecuteLoop.

Update CLAUDE.md Agent Service section, AGENTS.md bead_execution trigger
row and Merge Policy section, library SKILL.md files (ddx agent run →
ddx run), and personas/README.md to reflect the retired command surface.
Write AC#11 classification audit document.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
